views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing today's mood status, current streak, weekly mood trend sparkline, and emotion distribution summary with quick-add floating button

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Modal entry with an interactive mood slider (emoji face morphs from sad to happy), emotion chip selector, multi-select activity tags, energy and sleep sliders, and optional journal text

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Year-in-pixels calendar heatmap colored by mood rating, plus a date-grouped list of entries filterable by emotion and rating range

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Weekly and monthly mood trend line charts, emotion frequency pie chart, activity-mood correlation bar chart, sleep vs mood scatter insight, and AI-generated text insights

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayEntry
viewModelComputedProperties.description: The most recent entry logged today, nil if none exists

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayMoodLabel
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Human-readable label for today's mood rating (e.g. 'Great', 'Okay', 'Rough') mapped from 1-10 scale

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least one mood entry, breaking on any missed day

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average mood rating over the last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: previousWeekAverage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average mood rating for the 7 days before the current week, used for trend comparison

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Difference between weeklyAverage and previousWeekAverage; positive means improving mood

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyAverages
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Per-month average mood ratings for the last 6 months, used for trend line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: emotionFrequency
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Frequency count of each emotion across all entries, sorted descending for pie chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dominantEmotion
viewModelComputedProperties.description: The most frequently logged emotion in the last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: activityMoodCorrelation
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average mood rating grouped by activity tag, revealing which activities correlate with higher moods

viewModelComputedProperties.name: sleepMoodCorrelation
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Pearson correlation coefficient between sleep quality and mood rating over last 30 entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: energyMoodCorrelation
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Pearson correlation coefficient between energy level and mood rating over last 30 entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: bestDayOfWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Day of the week with the highest average mood rating (e.g. 'Saturday')

viewModelComputedProperties.name: worstDayOfWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Day of the week with the lowest average mood rating

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of days this week with a logged entry (0.0 to 1.0), targeting daily journaling

viewModelComputedProperties.name: calendarHeatmapData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Dictionary mapping dates to mood ratings for the year-in-pixels calendar view

viewModelComputedProperties.name: moodDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Histogram of mood ratings (1-10) showing how often each rating was used

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of computed text insights based on trends, correlations, streaks, and anomalies

dailyGoal.description: Log at least one mood entry per day to maintain streak and build self-awareness habit

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A streak day requires at least one entry with a mood rating. The streak breaks if a calendar day passes with zero entries. Streaks reset at midnight local time.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare current 7-day rolling average against previous 7-day average. Track month-over-month average mood. Detect sustained downtrends (3+ consecutive weeks declining) and uptrends. Flag anomalies where a single day deviates more than 3 points from the 7-day average.
insights: Weekly trend insight: 'Your mood improved by X.X points compared to last week' or 'Your mood dipped this week'
Activity correlation: 'You tend to feel best on days involving [activity] (avg X.X vs overall X.X)'
Sleep impact: 'Better sleep quality correlates with +X.X mood points for you'
Best/worst day: 'Saturdays are consistently your happiest day (avg X.X)'
Emotion pattern: 'You've felt [emotion] X times this month — that's more/less than usual'
Streak motivation: 'You've logged your mood X days in a row — keep the streak alive!'
Energy link: 'Your energy and mood are strongly correlated (r=0.XX) — boosting energy may help mood'
Social insight: 'You rate your mood X.X points higher when around others vs alone'
Monthly reflection: 'Your average mood this month is X.X — your best/worst month in 6 months'
Anomaly alert: 'Yesterday's rating of X was unusually low for you — check in with yourself'
